name: OCSF Threat Detection Dashboard
description: Active threats and detection triggers across all OCSF-normalized sources

panels.title: Brute Force Attacks
panels.query: * | filter (message contains 'Failed password' OR resultType matches '^[1-9]' OR error_code != null) | group count() as failed_attempts by coalesce(src_ip, src_endpoint_ip, callerIpAddress), user_name | filter failed_attempts >= 3 | sort -failed_attempts
panels.description: Source IPs with multiple failed authentication attempts

panels.title: Port Scan Activity
panels.query: serverHost in ('fortigate-ocsf','checkpoint-ocsf','paloalto-ocsf','watchguard-ocsf') | filter action='deny' | group hits=count() by srcip, dstport | group unique_ports=count() by srcip | filter unique_ports >= 5 | sort -unique_ports

panels.title: Suspicious Process Execution
panels.query: serverHost='linux-ocsf' | filter message matches '(mimikatz|psexec|netcat|nc -e|powershell.*-enc|bash.*-i|curl.*\.sh|wget.*\.sh|python.*-c.*socket)' | columns timestamp, message
panels.description: Detection of known attack tools and suspicious commands

panels.title: DNS Zone Transfer Attempts
panels.query: serverHost in ('msdns-ocsf','iscbind-ocsf') | filter message contains 'AXFR' OR message contains 'zone transfer' | columns timestamp, message

panels.title: Possible DNS Tunneling
panels.query: serverHost in ('msdns-ocsf','iscbind-ocsf') | filter length(message) > 200 | columns timestamp, message | limit 20
panels.description: Long DNS queries indicating potential tunneling

panels.title: Risky Sign-Ins (Entra ID)
panels.query: serverHost='entraid-ocsf' | filter message contains 'high' OR message contains 'medium' OR message contains 'risky' | columns timestamp, message | limit 20
panels.description: High-risk authentication events from Entra ID

panels.title: Database Privileged Actions
panels.query: serverHost in ('oracle-ocsf','hanadb-ocsf') | filter message contains 'GRANT' OR message contains 'CREATE USER' OR message contains 'BACKUP' | columns timestamp, message

panels.title: Lateral Movement Indicators
panels.query: serverHost in ('fortigate-ocsf','checkpoint-ocsf','paloalto-ocsf') | filter (dstport in (22,3389,445,5985,135) AND srcip matches '^(10\.|192\.168\.|172\.)') | group count() as conns by srcip, dstport | filter conns >= 3 | sort -conns
